message:
feat(fcp-protocol): add FCPC control-plane framing + session/protocol improvements

FCPC (Control Plane):
- Add fcpc.rs with FcpcFrame encode/decode, AEAD seal/open, replay window checks
- 36-byte header: magic + version + session_id + seq + flags + len
- ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD with k_ctx session key
- Proper replay detection via ReplayWindow

Session improvements:
- Refactor session MAC code, move datagram types to fcp-protocol
- Add datagram decode boundary tests (empty frame, max boundary)
- Add MAC verification tests (wrong key, tampered frame, wrong suite)
- Add additional session_mac tests for direction/sequence binding

Safety improvements:
- Replace unwrap() with proper error handling in fcps.rs header decode
- Add tests for zone_keys rotation and membership changes
- Add tests for rate limit enforcement (gqvh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
